name: NMN exercise tolerance older-adult registry
summary: Recruiting no-results registry testing NMN and a combination supplement arm for exercise tolerance in healthy older adults.
population: Healthy older adults with aging, frailty, and exercise-tolerance endpoints

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated completion is Jan. 1, 2027; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Combination and NMN-only arms will require careful attribution if results are posted.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
